SystemName.description: The name of the system. Can be null. Use 'linux' for Linux.

SystemVersion.description: The version of the system or distro. Use -1 for null.

DistroName.description: The name of the Linux distribution. Can be null.

DistroFamily.description: The family of the Linux distribution. Can be null.

ProcessorArchitecture.description: The architecture of the processor. Can be null.
